process.title: El Ciclo de Marketing Autonomo

research.title: Platform Analyzes Your Market 24/7
research.description: Our AI Research module monitors trends, competitors, and opportunities continuously. It identifies what content to create, when to publish, and which channels to prioritize.

content.title: AI Generates Premium Content at Scale
content.description: Content Pipelines produce 15x more content than traditional methods. Every piece is optimized for your brand voice, target audience, and platform requirements.

workflow.title: Manager Coordinates Everything
workflow.description: The Manager Orchestrator acts as your AI marketing coordinator, ensuring all modules work together seamlessly. No manual coordination needed.

publishing.title: Optimal Distribution Across Channels
publishing.description: Smart Publishing determines the best time, platform, and messaging for each piece of content. Achieves 35% better engagement through intelligent timing.

learning.title: Analytics Learn and Improve
learning.description: Self-Learning Analytics track performance and identify winning patterns. The platform becomes 23% more effective each month by learning from every campaign.

ads.title: Best Content Becomes Ads
ads.description: Top-performing organic content is automatically converted to paid ads with optimized targeting and budget allocation. Delivers 3.2x better ROAS.

process.loop_description: This process runs 24/7, with each iteration making the system smarter. By month 3, your marketing is 23% more effective. By month 12, it is transformational.

meta.title: Legal | Future Marketing AI
meta.description: Informacion legal para Future Marketing AI.

terms.title: Terminos de Servicio
terms.content: By using our services, you agree to the following terms and conditions. Future Marketing AI provides AI-powered marketing automation services on a subscription basis. All subscriptions are month-to-month unless otherwise agreed upon. We reserve the right to modify these terms with 30 days notice. Services are provided as-is, and while we strive for maximum uptime, we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

privacy.title: Politica de Privacidad
privacy.content: We collect personal data necessary to provide our services, including name, email, and company information submitted via our contact forms. Your data is processed in accordance with GDPR regulations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties. Data is stored securely within the EU and retained only for the duration of your business relationship with us. You have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data at any time.

cookies.title: Politica de Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies required for basic functionality and optional analytics cookies to improve our services. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function. Analytics cookies are only set with your explicit consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.

disclaimer.title: Aviso Legal
disclaimer.content: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.
